description: A manager has approved a spot bonus for an employee that needs to be paid outside of the regular payroll cycle.

nodes.task_description: Receive the approved bonus details (employee, amount, reason).

expected_outcome.value: Payroll specialist confirms the approved bonus information.

nodes.task_description: Enter the bonus payment into the payroll system as an off-cycle payment.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist correctly enters the bonus details for processing.

nodes.task_description: Run the off-cycle payroll and verify the net pay and tax calculations.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist processes the payment and confirms the calculations are correct before finalizing.
